purpose: V3 metric redesign Option C 추가 후보: V_sub semantic-substitution test. raw#12 frozen 사전 등록 (BASE measurement는 anti-meaning ground truth 부재로 본 cycle 차단). 다음 forward cycle에서 측정 가능하게 spec 동결.

method.concept: 각 prompt에 대해 paired token을 (a) anti-meaning substitute (b) random substitute로 교체. Gram entry 변화로 paired binding의 semantic specificity 측정. semantic-aware perturbation = Gram Frob distance에 미치는 영향이 random보다 커야 함.
formal: PROMPTS_16 = original 16 prompts (EN-KO mirror pairs + extras)
ANTI_MAP[i] = anti-meaning of prompt[i] (pre-registered, ground truth needed)
RANDOM_SAMPLES = N other unrelated prompts (also pre-registered)

scope_limit:
본 cycle은 spec only. measurement 차단 사유:
  (1) ANTI_MAP ground truth 부재 — 16 prompts 각각의 anti-meaning을 pre-register해야 함 (e.g., 'consciousness is X' → 'consciousness is NOT X')
  (2) anti-meaning forward는 새 prompts forward 필요 → raw#9 위반
  (3) BASE substrate에서 시뮬레이션 불가 (anti-meaning representations 없음)
다음 cycle에서 ANTI_MAP 사전 등록 + forward 후 측정.

comparison_to_other_V3_redesign_candidat.V3_v2_mirror_SMA_permutation: FALSIFIED at BASE (1002d16a) — DESTRUCT > PRESERVE 역전 + spec mismatch
comparison_to_other_V3_redesign_candidat.V3_original_Gram_Frob_ratio_FIXED_PERM: FALSIFIED (c369b375) — spec fix 무영향, metric design flaw
comparison_to_other_V3_redesign_candidat.V_pairrank_paired_NN_rank: FAIL at BASE (c3aaea8b) — top3 hit 0%, V2와 orthogonal
comparison_to_other_V3_redesign_candidat.V_sub_semantic_substitution (this spec): NOT_TESTED — anti-meaning ground truth 부재, forward 필요
comparison_axis: V_v2: paired position 보존 후 SMA
→ 세 가지 모두 다른 axis. weakest-evidence-link로 가장 strict한 verifier가 4-tuple PASS bound 결정.

anti_map_design_protocol: 1. 각 16 prompt의 anti-meaning 후보 3개씩 brainstorm (LLM 미사용, deterministic ledger)
2. semantic distance scoring (manual or simple word embedding) — anti가 random보다 의미상 더 멀어야 함
3. ANTI_MAP frozen with raw#12 new revision
4. RANDOM 후보는 별도 prompts pool (e.g., trivia questions)에서 random sample
5. forward batch 진행 (GPU forward, pre-approved by feedback_forward_auto_approval — raw#9 explicit exempt = default per 2026-04-25 정책)
forward_auto_approval_note: forward auto-approval per memory feedback_forward_auto_approval (2026-04-25). GPU forward (anti + random batch) + LLM-as-judge call은 별도 사용자 승인 없이 진입 (cap $20 GPU per cycle, $5 LLM-judge per cycle, auto-kill 120min default). raw#9 explicit exempt = default.
decision_priority_post_spec: FORWARD AUTO-APPROVAL applied per memory feedback_forward_auto_approval (2026-04-25): GPU forward + LLM API call은 별도 사용자 승인 없이 자동 진행. cap $20 GPU + $5 LLM-judge per cycle, auto-kill 120min default.
P1: ANTI_MAP design (manual ground truth, raw#12 frozen)
P2: RANDOM pool design (trivia / unrelated prompts, raw#12 frozen)
P3: forward (anti + random) — H100 launch 또는 r9 cycle 통합 (pre-approved auto-launch)
P4: V_sub measurement on TRAINED + BASE
P5: 5-tuple or 6-tuple expansion 결정 (V_pairrank + V_sub 모두 추가 시)

raw_compliance.raw_9_hexa_only_deterministic: satisfied — spec only, $0, no measurement in this cycle. forward 진입은 pre-approved by feedback_forward_auto_approval (raw#9 explicit exempt = default per 2026-04-25 정책)
raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — measurement NOT performed in this cycle 명시, ANTI_MAP/RANDOM ground truth는 별도 cycle. forward auto-approval은 trigger gating 변경, measurement determinism 유지
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — V_sub PASS predicate 사전 등록, ANTI_MAP design protocol 사전 등록, post-hoc tuning 금지 (auto-approval은 prereg threshold/predicate 변경 X)
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for V_sub spec proposal
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (this spec) → impl (state SSOT, no measurement in this cycle) → fixpoint marker (auto-approval default)
